name: io.github.Vaquill-AI/courtlistener-mcp
title: CourtListener
description: MCP server for the CourtListener legal database (US federal and state court opinions, dockets, RECAP filings, PACER data, oral arguments, judges) plus the Electronic Code of Federal Regulations (eCFR). MIT-licensed. Bring-your-own free CourtListener token; the server never stores keys.

headers.name: X-CourtListener-Token
headers.description: Your free CourtListener API token from https://www.courtlistener.com/help/api/rest/. The server never stores your key.
